name: THSV StreamBridge - User Translate
author: surakage
description: Performs creator-approved, timeout-bounded MyMemory translation requests for the User Translate add-on and relays the result to StreamBridge.

actions.name: THSV Addon - User Translate - Translate Text

triggerSafety: Broker-dispatched only. Do not attach triggers; StreamBridge restricts calls to the creator-approved action ID.
verificationStatus: Source and package structure tested; live provider and platform-chat acceptance remains creator-verified.
